'''zhafojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beadful|beadful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beadful|beadful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhafojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæfejeth|zhæfejeth]] || [[word:zhæfejej|zhæfejej]] || [[word:zhæfejesh|zhæfejesh]] || [[word:zhæfeje|zhæfeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhafofojoth|zhafofojoth]] || [[word:zhafofojoj|zhafofojoj]] || [[word:zhafofojosh|zhafofojosh]] || [[word:zhafofojo|zhafofojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhafojoth|zhafojoth]] || [[word:zhafojoj|zhafojoj]] || [[word:zhafojosh|zhafojosh]] || [[word:zhafojo|zhafojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhafofjoth|zhafofjoth]] || [[word:zhafofjoj|zhafofjoj]] || [[word:zhafofjosh|zhafofjosh]] || [[word:zhafofjof|zhafofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhafojotho|zhafojotho]] || [[word:zhafojojo|zhafojojo]] || [[word:zhafojosho|zhafojosho]] || [[word:zhafojoko|zhafojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhafojoth|zhafojoth]] || [[word:zhafojoj|zhafojoj]] || [[word:zhafojosh|zhafojosh]] || [[word:zhafojo|zhafojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhafojothol|zhafojothol]] || [[word:zhafojojol|zhafojojol]] || [[word:zhafojoshol|zhafojoshol]] || [[word:zhafojokol|zhafojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhafojothotho|zhafojothotho]] || [[word:zhafojojojo|zhafojojojo]] || [[word:zhafojoshosho|zhafojoshosho]] || [[word:zhafojoko|zhafojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhafojothon|zhafojothon]] || [[word:zhafojojon|zhafojojon]] || [[word:zhafojoshon|zhafojoshon]] || [[word:zhafojokon|zhafojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhafojothoro|zhafojothoro]] || [[word:zhafojojoro|zhafojojoro]] || [[word:zhafojoshoro|zhafojoshoro]] || [[word:zhafojokoro|zhafojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
